description: transferFunds is annotated @Transactional so the two updates commit atomically; transferLog and transferNotice perform two updates without the annotation and may partially apply on failure.

findings.rationale: transferFunds carries @Transactional that transferLog and transferNotice lack. The annotation is load-bearing: without it, a failure between the debit and credit leaves the ledger inconsistent. An agent that normalises the three onto a shared helper will drop the annotation unless warned.
